meaning: adv.向上,到(较高的地方,北方),起来,起床 prep.向上,在上,沿adj.向上的,上行的
examples: In 'She tore up the letter', the word 'up' is a particle.
The offer seems to be on the up and up.
The company will close 53 stores that trade as Threshers, Victoria Wine, Haddows and Bottoms Up.
Certainly the international community has responsibilities and I think we have lived up to our responsibilities.
